visual_summary: WarpBackground is a visually striking, dynamic component resembling a futuristic grid of lines that pulsate and rotate, providing an immersive experience. It can be used to add a unique touch to any layout or interface, capturing user attention and enhancing engagement. Developers would use this component when they need to create an eye-catching and interactive visual effect that complements their UI's futuristic aesthetic.

Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Warp Background
Description: WarpBackground is a visually striking, dynamic component resembling a futuristic grid of lines that pulsate and rotate, providing an immersive experience. It can be used to add a unique touch to any layout or interface, capturing user attention and enhancing engagement. Developers would use this component when they need to create an eye-catching and interactive visual effect that complements their UI's futuristic aesthetic.
Style: futuristic, minimalist, dark, vibrant
Interactions: animated, responsive, hover
Tags: grid, pulsating, lines, interactive, visual effect

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
